feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Requirement to trigger automated email on production order release
entry.content:
Description – We would like to implement a functionality in SAP public cloud where, upon releasing a production order, an automated email is triggered to notify specific recipients. Currently, no such notification is being sent. We would like to understand the standard for recommended approach to enable this functionality. Please provide guidance on the configuration or development steps required to trigger an automated email upon production order release.

 

Requirements –

  • Trigger email automatically when a prod. Order is released.
  • Email should be sent to predefined recipients.
  • Looking for a standard or recommended solution.

SAP PUBLIC CLOUD latest version 2502 

Regards,
Ankit Kumar

entry.title: "Print queue name can't be initial" warning when trying to display document
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

When checking the output of a Sales Document and clicking on 'Display Document' button, a warning dis displayed: "Print queue name can't be initial".
The users then have to click on 'Continue' to skip this warning. Is there a way to not show this warning or proceed automatically?

Best regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP S4 Cloud Public in J77 test script, prequisite 6BP test script is missing
entry.content:
We are doing SAP Cloud Public in J77 test script - Advanced Bank Account Management:
4.3. Create In-House Account via eBAM step, there is a prequisite 6BP test script that I have to activate before testing the J77 test script.
However, I can't find the prequisite 6BP - Create via eBAM Integration step in In-House Banking test script.
I have checked on the Internet, on SAP for me portal, among master data scrips, but I didn't find it.
Do you know where can I find the Create via eBAM Integration step in In-House Banking 6BP script? Does it have a new name?
Thank you.

entry.title: How to solve Partner function is not defined in partner procedure error?
entry.content:
We are getting the error "Partner function XX* is not defined in partner procedure ABC*", how can we solve this?

*Where XX represents the Partner Function ID and ABC represents the partner procedure. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Issue with billing Document type F2
entry.content:
Issue Details:

 

The business have requirement for triggering 4 different Invoice billing documents and in S4 PERSON_NAME Public Cloud, we have only 1 billing document type (F2 ).

 

With OPD configuration, system is able to recognize only one document type and the same is triggering every time based on the defined rules for determination.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Side by Side extension APPlication
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are facing a peculiar issue for our custom side by side application which we have created BTP with S4HANA public cloud. 

Our architecture includes "S4HANA extensibility service" for creating communication arrangements on the Public cloud side along with the development of custom app using NODE.js within CF framework. 

Our destination service connectivity is all intact and we have been able to pull the metadata of the service using the user id and password we provided in the json file we used for the "S4HANA extensibility service"

We have one subaccount and have tied it up with the IAS/IPS server of the S4HANA public cloud. Our global account is still tied up with the standard (default) SAP ID.

 

When we try to get to our portal/workzone subscription site, we get authenticated via IAS server of public cloud which is correct. However, when the site tries to open, we get the below error 

Appreciate your help.

entry.title: Direct API call from SAP S/4 HANA public cloud to third party cloud system without Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We are working on requirement to integrate SAP and non-SAP system. We have SAP S/4 HANA public cloud edition through which we need to do API call (GET/POST), provided by third party cloud system. I understand we can achieve same with SAP 'Integration suite service' (hosted on SAP BTP account) but in our case it is not an option to do so.

We are looking to do Direct API call ( like how can we do on ECC or S/4 on premise system, by using SM59 HTTP connection and using cl_http* class) .

But can we achieve same with SAP S/4 HANA public cloud edition without any integration (middleware) system?

It would be very helpful if someone has any insights regarding this.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Activate activity-based consolidation of Investments
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

we would like to use the activity-Based Consolidation of Investments. As this is not activated by default in the cloud solution anymore, we request to activate the activity-Based Consolidation of Investments in our cloud system, as we do not wish to use rule-based consolidation. Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to automate the Audit Extraction Data related to ITGC in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud ?
entry.content:
Hi Community Experts, 

I am looking for a solution, where we can automate the process of extracting the data related ITGC audit controls and if there is any possibility of the same ?

We have few ITGC Controls in place which utilizes the application in S4HANA Public cloud such as i.e. "Manage Business Users", "Manager Business Roles", "Import Collection", "Display Technical Roles" etc which would help us to do a check to make sure that the audit regulations are met.

Any such lead on this would be much appreciated. 

 

Thanks & Regards,

Evans Aarons

entry.title: Run Foreign Trade Regulations Z4
entry.content:
Hello,

Can anyone help here?

Application: Run Foreign Trade Regulations Z4.

The customer pulls an XML file from the SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud, but it contains missing data and cannot be sent to the Federal Office.

Description of the problem:
Data is missing that was actually created in customising for the company codes.

The following data is missing and is not contained in the XML file:
Economic sector
Company address
Telephone number
Contact person
E-mail address
Company number
---> although this data is set in customising (foreign trade and balance of payments). (see screen1 and 2)

In addition, the XML structure does not contain a field for the commodity code.
Is there a way to insert a commodity code field in this XML file structure? If so, how?

Many thanks in advance.

Yours sincerely
N.S.

entry.title: How to Check User T-Code/Tile Usage (Last 2 Months)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,


We need to check which T-Codes or Fiori tiles were used by user in the last 2 months.


Kindly let us know how we can view this data — is there any specific tile, report, or method available?


Please share the steps or guidance as soon as possible.


Regards,


Udayraj K


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Changing the transaction status of a position flow without actually posting it.
entry.content:
• How to change the status of the position flow into fixed from being scheduled? 
  • The status of a position flow remains as scheduled even after manual posting.
  • The scheduled position flow is picked up in subsequent posting runs, despite having been posted previously.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is there any way to use se38 report in SAP public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Scenario: I'm using sflight table but its delivered empty record. So, sap help portal suggesting use SAPBC_DATA_GENERATOR report. problem is SAP public cloud is not allowing to execute reports (SE38). is there any way to use SAPBC_DATA_GENERATOR?

Regards,

Nirojan.

entry.title: Why Evaluated Receipt Settlement (ERS) schedule job always have no document selected
entry.content:
Hello, We're implementing HongKong company for Public Cloud 2502 version. When we test the 2LH Schedule Supplier Invoice Jobs, select the Job template "Evaluated Receipt Settlement (ERS)", no matter we select by supplier, or goods receipt document, or purchase document, always no document selected.

Do you meet such problems? and how to solve it? Thank you in advance.

Best Regards,

Grace

entry.title: Implementation of German Electronic Invoices in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
1. Can we implement German electronic invoices with only a Dutch company code?
2. Is the DRC cloud edition solution required to implement German electronic invoices?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Event-Based Revenue Recognition - Customer projects SPTM Key
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,
We are implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public and have some customer projects managed with revenue recognition key SPTM (Time & Expenses) and COSPTM as assignment rule.

However, when we post expenses to these projects (e.g. with transaction RKU1), the system does not trigger the corresponding event-based revenue recognition posting.
We have checked that the GL accounts are included in YBPS_E000, and also that this cost element group is included in the sources YE0 and YS0.

Could you please help us with this issue?
Thanks in advance

María

entry.title: TRM Transaction Management - Reverse Cash Flow
entry.content:
Dear All,

Customer has implemented S/4HANA Public Cloud including Treasury Management.

Customer is trying to reverse posted Cash Flow. According to process steps App Manage Financial Transactions in Edit Mode, Cash Flow tab, and then choose Editing Mode -> Reverse. The Reverse option is greyed. 

Please advise how this could be solved and cash flow reversed.

Kind regards,

Slađana

entry.title: Power of Attorney vs. Payment Approvers: Key Differences, Use Cases, and Legal Considerations
entry.content:
• The functional and operational differences between PoA and payment approvers.
• Clear scenarios or business cases where the use of PoA adds value beyond payment approval setup.
• Any legal, audit, or compliance implications tied to PoA usage in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Mass Creation of Purchase Orders
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Our user hope to mass upload purchase orders.

Is there any method? Can we teach user to use data migration tool to upload PO after project go-live?

I found this scope item  Mass Creation of Purchase Orders (6VW) in help portal .

Whether business automation tool and RPA need additional license?

Best Regards

Gloria

entry.title: Cumulative, Opening balance calculation SAP Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud implementation and using Key User Extensibility to create Custom CDS Views. I need to calculate balances of each JE posted to GL Account:

1. Cumulative Balance – a running total based on a date or period

2. Opening Balance – the balance as of the beginning of the selected period.

I am aware that in public cloud, we are limited to certain functionalities. 

Could anyone guide me on:

Is it possible to implement such logic using only Key User tools (e.g., Custom CDS Views))?

Thanks.
